creator.not_found: Ei creator profile is associated with your account. Please sign out and sign in again, or contact support.
creator.already_approved: This creator has already been approved.
creator.already_rejected: This creator has already been rejected.
creator.kyc_not_verified: This creator's identity must be verified before the application can be approved.
creator.kyc_already_verified: This creator's identity has already been verified.

admin.field_status_immutable: Application status cannot be changed through this form. Use the approve or reject actions instead.

social.invalid_platform: That social platform is not supported.

wizard.feature_disabled: This step is currently unavailable while a configuration change is in progress. Skip to continue your application.
wizard.feature_enabled: This option is not available right now — please use the standard flow for this step.
wizard.incomplete: Cannot submit your application yet — one or more wizard steps are still incomplete.

reopen.invalid_state: Only a rejected application can be reopened.

wizard.title: Set up your creator profile
wizard.subtitle: A few steps to introduce yourself to brands.

skipped.label: Skipped
skipped.explanation: This step is not required at this time. An admin will review your application without it.

save_status.error: Could not save — please try again.

profile.name: Profiili basics
profile.title: Tell us about yourself
profile.description: Your display name, bio, photo, and the categories you create in.

connections.name: Sosiaalinen media ja portfolio
connections.title: Lisää tilisi ja työsi
connections.description: Lisää vähintään yksi sosiaalisen median tili ja yksi portfolio-työ, jotta brändit näkevät tavoittavuutesi ja tyylisi.

social.name: Social accounts
social.title: Lisää sosiaalisen median tilisi
social.description: Lisää vähintään yksi alusta, jotta brändit näkevät kattavuutesi.

portfolio.name: Portfolio
portfolio.title: Show your best work
portfolio.description: Lähetä tiedosto up to 30 kohteet — videos, images, or external links — that represent your style.

kyc.name: Identity verification
kyc.title: Verify your identity
kyc.description: A quick check with our verification partner. Pakollinen for payouts.
kyc.skipped_explanation: Identity verification is not required at this time.

tax.name: Tax information
tax.title: Tax form
tax.description: We need a tax form for payouts, even before your first one.
tax.on_file_body: Your tax details are saved securely. For your privacy we don't display them again — choose Päivitä to re-enter them.

payout.name: Payout method
payout.title: Set up payouts
payout.description: Connect a Stripe Express account to receive payments.
payout.skipped_explanation: Payout setup is not required at this time.

contract.name: Master agreement
contract.title: Sign the master agreement
contract.description: Our standard creator agreement covers brand collaborations on the platform.
contract.skipped_explanation: Sopimus signing is not required at this time — please accept the click-through terms below.
contract.click_through_label: I have read and accept these terms.
contract.click_through_help: Read the agreement above, then check the box to continue.
contract.accepted_body: You've accepted the master agreement. Jatka to the next step.

review.name: Review and submit
review.title: Review your application
review.description: Take a moment to review everything before submitting.
review.incomplete_blocker: You have 1 incomplete step: {names}. Click Muokkaa to finish it before submitting. | You have {count} incomplete steps: {names}. Click Muokkaa on each to finish them before submitting.
review.two_signal_ready: Profiilisi on {percent}% valmis — kaikki lähettämiseen vaadittava on tehty. Voit lisätä lisää vahvistaaksesi profiiliasi.

fields.display_name_help: How brands will see you — your handle or stage name.
fields.bio_help: A short introduction. You can use **bold**, *italics*, and [links](https://example.com).
fields.avatar_drop: Drop a photo here, or click to choose. JPG, PNG, or WebP up to 5 MB.
fields.contact_section_help: Valinnainen. Jaetaan vain niille toimistoille, joihin sinulla on yhteys — ei koskaan näytetä julkisesti.
fields.accent_help: Valinnainen. Esimerkiksi brittiläinen, brasilialainen tai baijerilainen.
fields.categories_help: Pick the categories that best describe what you create.
fields.avatar_required: A profile photo is required to finish this step.
fields.social_handle_hint: Enter your username only — no {'@'} symbol or full profile URL.
fields.social_handle_invalid: Enter a valid username: 2–30 letters, numbers, dots, underscores or hyphens (no spaces, {'@'}, or URLs).

vendor_bounce.waiting_description: We're waiting on a response from our partner. This usually takes under a minute.
vendor_bounce.timeout_description: This is taking longer than expected. You can try again or contact support.

welcome_back.title: Tervetuloa back
welcome_back.subtitle: You were last here {time_ago}. Pick up where you left off.
welcome_back.first_time_subtitle: Tervetuloa to Catalyst. Let's set up your creator profile — it only takes a few minutes.
welcome_back.first_time_prompt: Start with {step} to introduce yourself to brands.
welcome_back.next_step_prompt: You're on Step {step}. Jatka here, or jump back to edit an earlier step.
welcome_back.all_complete_prompt: Looking good — you've completed every step. Ready to submit?

floor.incomplete_hint: Täytä näyttönimi, maa, kieli, kategoriat ja profiilikuva ennen tallentamista.
floor.approved_warning: Tämä heikentää profiilisi täydellisyyttä, jonka toimistot näkevät haussa.
floor.social_warning: Viimeisen sosiaalisen tilin poistaminen merkitsee profiilisi keskeneräiseksi.
floor.portfolio_warning: Viimeisen portfoliokohteen poistaminen merkitsee profiilisi keskeneräiseksi.

profile.title: Muokkaa profiilia
profile.account_hint: Annettu rekisteröitymisen yhteydessä. Näitä tietoja ei voi muokata tässä.

submitted.heading: Application submitted
submitted.description: Your profile is under review. We'll notify you within 3 business days.

pending_review.title: Application under review
pending_review.description: Your application is in our queue. We'll notify you within 3 business days.

approved.title: Tervetuloa to Catalyst
approved.heading: You're approved
approved.description: You're approved to receive brand collaborations. The full creator dashboard ships soon.

rejected.title: Application not approved
rejected.heading: Application needs changes
rejected.description: Review the notes below, update your application, and resubmit it for another review.
rejected.resubmit_failed: We couldn't reopen your application. Please try again.

incomplete.title: Jatka your application
incomplete.description: Pick up where you left off — your wizard progress is saved.

empty.title: Ei connection requests
empty.body: When an agency invites you to connect, it'll appear here.

toast.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

assignments.title: Kampanja invitations
assignments.pending: You have {count} invitation(s) awaiting your response.

assignments.title: Kampanja invitations
assignments.subtitle: Hyväksy, decline, or counter the fee on campaigns you've been invited to.

detail.notFound: This assignment could not be found.
detail.loadFailed: We couldn't load this assignment. Please try again.
detail.awaitingReview: Your draft has been submitted and is awaiting agency review.
detail.awaitingVerification: Your post has been recorded and is awaiting verification.

resubmitInPlace.title: We couldn't verify your post
resubmitInPlace.intro: Automatic verification of your post failed. Check the link is correct and points to your published post, then resubmit it below.
resubmitInPlace.toast: Link resubmitted — we'll re-check it shortly.

contract.title: Kampanja contract
contract.awaitingAgency: The agency will send a contract for you to review and accept. You'll be notified when it's ready — check back here then.
contract.signingDisabled: Sopimus signing is not enabled yet. The agency will contact you when it's time to proceed.

toast.accepted: Sopimus accepted. You can now submit your draft.

revision.title: Revision requested
revision.noFeedback: The agency has requested changes. Please resubmit an updated draft.

toast.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

empty.title: Ei campaign invitations
empty.body: When an agency invites you to a campaign, it'll appear here.

toast.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

counterDialog.title: Counter the fee
counterDialog.body: Propose a different fee for this campaign. The agency can re-offer or withdraw.

upload.avatar_prompt: Drop a photo here, or click to choose
upload.portfolio_prompt: Drop files here, or click to choose
upload.portfolio_size_hint: Images up to {image_mb} MB · videos up to {video_mb} MB
upload.portfolio_queue_status: {in_flight} of {total} uploading (up to {concurrency} at a time).

errors.upload_too_large: This file is too large. The maximum size is {max_mb} MB.
errors.upload_wrong_type: This file type is not supported. Use {allowed_types}.
errors.upload_failed: The upload failed. Please try again.
errors.portfolio_max_reached: You can upload up to {max} portfolio kohteet.
